blocks.content: Ruth Jenkins died on a morning in April.
Not in a hospital, but at home in her own bed. Kit and Daisy had been there for the last four days, taking shifts.
She went quietly, in the morning, with her son in the next room.
He was the one who found her. Daisy came out of the kitchen and saw his face and she didn't need words.
There were calls to make and people to notify. Kit moved through it all.
Daisy stayed close. She didn't try to fix anything. She just didn't leave.
Eli drove up from Savannah that afternoon with Meilin. They came in without knocking and Eli put both arms around Kit and held on without saying anything.
Meilin and Daisy sat on the couch.
